repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest catalogue entries eid_compositional_reallocation_effect_v1 and eid_proximal_completeness_v1 do not state ordered IPSI-LMTP means

published_prior_art.cite: Kennedy2019JASA https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2017.1422737; DiazWilliamsHoffmanSchenck2023JASA https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2021.1955691; YoungHernanRobins2014EM https://doi.org/10.1515/em-2012-0001 give the single-policy g-formula ingredients

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_completeness_v1: row-space/proximal weak-ID frontier, not policy-operator commutator; eid_compositional_reallocation_effect_v1: failed support-span angle

published_prior_art.cite: No verified named paper gives this exact commutator coefficient; closest papers define IPSI/LMTP/natural-value or representation-sensitive interventions without the operator-difference certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue policy-operator zero-phase theorem found in doc/API.md or cited bank entries

published_prior_art.cite: SarvetWanisYoungHernandezAlejandroStensrud2023Biometrics https://doi.org/10.1111/biom.13860 and WenMarcusYoung2023SMMR https://doi.org/10.1177/09622802221146311 study realistic/observed-process intervention distributions but not this zero phase

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: For a flagship target, the Section 8 comparator claim cites Kennedy2019JASA and DiazWilliamsHoffmanSchenck2023JASA only by bibkey and does not anchor the operator gap to a theorem, equation, section, or open-problem sentence in either paper.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The LMTP operator M is never specified as a policy map or post-intervention A2 kernel; Definition 2 defines two observed functionals directly, so the theorem does not yet identify a well-specified causal regime.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: After Definition 2, Delta equals [w1(s_delta(e))-w1(e)](r1-r0), and w1(x)=q0+x(q1-q0); the advertised factorization is routine binary algebra, not a flagship-level kernel.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The zero phase is just the real product-zero corollary of Conjecture 1 plus the nonzero odds-shift factor in Assumption 5, so it adds no independent mathematical frontier.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Fully define the LMTP natural-value policy as an explicit kernel or map from observed history and natural A2, then restate Theorem 1 as identification of that causal regime rather than as named observed functionals.

Replace the two-time binary product-zero result with a genuinely non-routine T-time or multi-policy commutator criterion, such as an algorithm that decides commutation from observed kernels with stated input format and complexity.
Add location-level anchors to the closest IPSI, LMTP, natural-value, and observed-process intervention results, and state exactly which theorem/equation lacks an ordered-operator certificate.

recommended_next_step: Do not advance this as flagship; either pivot or substantially generalize beyond the two-time product-algebra kernel.
